summary: Frontend-only testing of mobile footer accordion in UnifiedFooter.js. All 9 test cases passed. Mobile (390px): accordions collapsed by default with max-height:0, expand/collapse with smooth animation, chevron rotation working (▼→▲), 0px gap between sections, border-top separators present. Desktop (1440px): 4-column grid with 44px gap, all 17 links visible, no accordion behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile footer accordion fully functional. SERVICES (9 links) and COMPANY (8 links) accordions collapse/expand correctly with chevron rotation. Desktop shows 4-column grid with 44px gap. All data-testid attributes working: footer-accordion-services, footer-accordion-company, footer-phone, footer-book-cta.
